ViewDef.Title: [Custom] VM Cost Details
ViewDef.Description: List view with VM details , Relation , Unit rate, cost for CPU, Memory and Storage, Tags

ViewDef.Title: [VCF Content Factory] VM Performance + Storage
ViewDef.Description: Virtual machine CPU, memory, and virtual disk performance metrics. Designed for a "VM performance by datastore type" dashboard. Intended default sort: descending by CPU Ready — surfaces worst-offender VMs first. All columns use the latest/last sample (CURRENT transformation). Note: sort order and aggregation selection are not yet encoded in the loader/packager; set the default sort in the dashboard widget or view UI after import.

ViewDef.Title: [AI Content] VKS Core Consumption by vCenter
ViewDef.Description: One row per vCenter. VM vCPUs grouped by role (regular, VKS worker, Supervisor CP, vCLS, VM Service), plus physical cores and the computed VKS core equivalent (VKS Worker vCPU / Global Ratio). Replaces the per-vCenter PowerCLI VKS core-consumption script.

ViewDef.Title: [VCF Content Factory] VKS Core Consumption by vCenter
ViewDef.Description: One row per vCenter. Columns match the PowerShell VKS core consumption script output exactly: Total VM vCPU, VKS vCPU (all node image VMs — CP+Worker), Supervisor vCPU, Pod vCPU, VM Service vCPU, Regular vCPU, vCLS vCPU, Physical Cores, Global Ratio, and Calculated VKS Cores.

ViewDef.Title: [AI Content] VM Performance + Storage
ViewDef.Description: Virtual machine CPU, memory, and virtual disk performance metrics. Designed for a "VM performance by datastore type" dashboard. Intended default sort: descending by CPU Ready — surfaces worst-offender VMs first. All columns use the latest/last sample (CURRENT transformation). Note: sort order and aggregation selection are not yet encoded in the loader/packager; set the default sort in the dashboard widget or view UI after import.

ViewDef.Title: [VCF Content Factory] VM Performance List
ViewDef.Description: List of virtual machines with key CPU and memory performance metrics. Designed to be embedded in a dashboard and filtered by a ResourceList interaction (selecting a vCenter narrows the list to that vCenter's descendants).

ViewDef.Title: [AI Content] VM Performance List
ViewDef.Description: List of virtual machines with key CPU and memory performance metrics. Designed to be embedded in a dashboard and filtered by a ResourceList interaction (selecting a vCenter narrows the list to that vCenter's descendants).

ViewDef.Title: [Custom] VM Cost Details with Summary
ViewDef.Description: List view with VM details , Relation , Unit rate, cost for CPU, Memory and Storage, Tags
